TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jeff_Anderson, title = Jeff_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jeff_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Jeff Anderson kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Jeff Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Jeff Anderson kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Jeff Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *e** an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *e** an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
